game_info.title: Untitled Game
game_info.concept:
{
  "game_name": "Last War:Survival",
  "genre": "Card",
  "core_mechanics": {
    "player_actions": [
      "Deploy Hero: Player clicks on a hero card in the UI (bottom panel) to select it, then clicks on one of the three available combat lanes to deploy the hero. This consumes resources and triggers a cooldown for that hero card.",
      "Activate Hero Skill: Once a hero is deployed and their skill is charged, player clicks on the deployed hero unit on the combat lane or presses a mapped key. This triggers a unique skill.",
      "Collect Resources: In the 'BASE_BUILDING' state, player clicks a 'Collect All Resources' button to gather accumulated Gold and Supplies from base structures.",
      "Upgrade Base Structure: In the 'BASE_BUILDING' state, player clicks on a base structure (e.g., 'Resource Generator', 'Training Facility') to view its details, then clicks an 'Upgrade' button to spend resources and level up the structure.",
      "Navigate Menus: Player clicks on buttons (e.g., 'Start Game', 'Back to Base', 'Start Combat Level') to transition between game states."
    ],
    "rules_and_systems": {
      "combat_system": "Lane-based, real-time combat. There are 3 horizontal lanes. Zombies spawn on the right side of the screen and move left towards the player's base. Heroes are deployed on the left side of a lane and move right, automatically attacking the first zombie they encounter in their lane. If a hero's path is blocked by a zombie, they will stop and attack. If a zombie reaches the far left edge of a lane, it deals damage to the player's base HP. Combat progresses through waves.",
      "hero_deployment": "Each hero has a resource cost (Gold) and a deployment cooldown. Players can only deploy a limited number of heroes per lane (e.g., 3). Heroes have unique stats (HP, Attack Damage, Attack Speed) and a unique skill (e.g., single target burst, area of effect, stun). Different heroes belong to different branches (e.g., Infantry for front-line, Engineer for obstacles/defense, Medic for healing).",
      "zombie_system": "Zombies have HP, Attack Damage, and Speed. Different zombie types exist (e.g., Basic Walker, Fast Runner, Tank Zombie). Waves introduce increasing numbers and varieties of zombies.",
      "obstacle_system": "Static objects (e.g., barricades, abandoned vehicles) can appear in lanes, blocking hero and zombie movement. They have HP and must be destroyed by heroes before units can pass.",
      "base_building_system": "Features a 'Resource Generator' (produces Gold, Supplies over time), 'Training Facility' (unlocks/upgrades heroes), and 'Command Center' (unlocks new combat levels, increases overall base HP). Upgrades cost resources and are instant for this simplification.",
      "resource_system": "Two main resources: Gold (for hero deployment, base upgrades) and Supplies (for hero leveling, specific base upgrades). Resources are generated by base structures (collected by player) and awarded upon combat wave/level completion.",
      "hero_progression": "Heroes are unlocked through base upgrades or completing specific levels. Heroes can be 'leveled up' (spending resources) to increase their stats (HP, damage) and potentially reduce skill cooldowns."
    },
    "state_tracking": {
      "global_state": "Current game_state (MENU, COMBAT, BASE_BUILDING, PAUSED, LEVEL_TRANSITION, GAME_OVER, WIN).",
      "player_state": "Current Gold, Current Supplies, Player Base HP, Current Level, Total Score, High Score.",
      "combat_state": "Current wave number, Remaining zombies in current wave, Zombie positions and HP, Hero positions, HP, cooldowns, and active skill status, Lane status (obstacles, base damage points).",
      "base_state": "Level of each base structure, Time elapsed for resource generation (or amount ready for collection), Unlocked heroes, Level/XP of each owned hero."
    }
  },
  "visual_elements": {
    "game_objects": {
      "combat_scene": {
        "background": "A grayscale p5.js `image()` or `rect()` background depicting desolate city ruins, divided into 3 distinct horizontal lanes by thin gray lines. The left-most 10% of the screen represents the player's base zone.",
        "player_base": "A green `rect()` or simple `image()` on the far left of the screen, extending vertically across all 3 lanes, representing the player's primary defensive structure. A small health bar over it.",
        "zombies": "Varied `rect()` or simple `image()` sprites. Basic Walkers: Gray-green, slow. Fast Runners: Thin, dark red, faster. Tank Zombies: Large, dark brown, slow, high HP. All zombies have a red-to-green HP bar rendered above them.",
        "heroes": "Distinct `rect()` or simple `image()` sprites. Infantry: Blue, medium size. Engineer: Yellow, slightly smaller. Medic: White, small. Each has a blue-to-red HP bar above them, and a circular cooldown indicator around their sprite when skill is on cooldown.",
        "projectiles_effects": "Simple `circle()` or `line()` for hero attacks (e.g., red bullets for Infantry). `ellipse()` bursts or color changes for hero skills (e.g., a green circle for Medic heal, a yellow explosion for Engineer AoE).",
        "obstacles": "`rect()` or `image()` of barricades (brown) and abandoned cars (dark gray) in lanes. They have a small, visible HP bar."
      },
      "base_building_scene": {
        "background": "A sepia-toned `image()` or `rect()` background depicting a shelter interior/exterior.",
        "structures": "Simple `rect()` shapes with labels (e.g., 'Resource Gen', 'Training', 'Command'). Each shows its current level and an 'Upgrade' button.",
        "hero_roster": "A grid of `rect()` or `image()` cards for each owned hero, showing their icon, level, and 'Level Up' button."
      },
      "ui_elements": {
        "combat_ui": {
          "hero_cards": "Bottom panel, 3 `rect()` cards, each with hero icon, Gold cost, and a cooldown timer/overlay. A glowing border indicates selection.",
          "resource_display": "Top-left corner: 'Gold: [amount]', 'Supplies: [amount]'.",
          "wave_counter": "Center-top: 'WAVE: [current]/[total]'.",
          "score_display": "Top-right corner: 'SCORE: [score value]' (e.g., 20px font, white text).",
          "level_indicator": "Top-left corner, below resources: 'LEVEL: [current]' (e.g., 18px font, white text).",
          "pause_button": "Top-right corner, small `rect()` or `image()` icon."
        },
        "base_ui": {
          "structure_info_panels": "Dynamic `rect()` panels appearing when a structure is clicked, showing its description, current level, benefits, and 'Upgrade' button.",
          "collect_all_button": "`rect()` button in a prominent position (e.g., center-bottom) labeled 'Collect All Resources'.",
          "back_to_combat_button": "`rect()` button (e.g., bottom-right) labeled 'Start Combat' or 'Next Level'.",
          "resource_display": "Top-left corner, same as combat UI."
        },
        "general_ui": {
          "main_menu": "`rect()` buttons for 'START GAME', 'OPTIONS' (placeholder for future), 'EXIT'.",
          "level_transition_screen": "Full-screen `rect()` with text 'Level [X] Complete!' or 'Preparing for Level [X+1]'.",
          "game_over_screen": "Full-screen `rect()` with 'GAME OVER' text, score, and 'RETRY' button.",
          "win_screen": "Full-screen `rect()` with 'YOU SURVIVED!' text, final score, and 'PLAY AGAIN' button."
        }
      }
    },
    "animations_visual_effects": [
      "Entity Movement: `x` and `y` coordinate changes for heroes and zombies, using `lerp()` for smoother motion.",
      "Attack Animation: Brief visual flash or a simple `line()`/`circle()` projectile originating from attacker to target.",
      "Skill Activation: Larger `ellipse()` or `rect()` burst/glow effect at the hero's position or target area.",
      "HP Bar Changes: Gradual visual decrease of the HP bar, possibly color-shifting from green to red.",
      "Resource Collection: Small numbers 'pop' up from collected resources and fade away as they add to the total.",
      "UI Button Hover/Click: Color change or slight scaling on hover, distinct press animation on click."
    ]
  },
  "control_scheme": {
    "mouse_controls": [
      "Left Click: Primary interaction for deploying heroes, activating skills (by clicking on hero), interacting with all UI elements (buttons, structures, hero cards)."
    ],
    "keyboard_controls": [
      "`W`: Selects the first hero card in the deployment UI (e.g., Infantry).",
      "`A`: Selects the second hero card in the deployment UI (e.g., Engineer).",
      "`S`: Selects the third hero card in the deployment UI (e.g., Medic).",
      "`Space`: If a hero card is selected, attempts to deploy the hero in the currently targeted lane (defaulting to middle lane if no lane is specifically targeted). Can also act as a universal 'Collect All Resources' button in the base.",
      "`ArrowUp`: During combat, shifts the hero deployment target to the lane above the current target (cycles from top to bottom).",
      "`ArrowDown`: During combat, shifts the hero deployment target to the lane below the current target (cycles from bottom to top).",
      "`Shift`: Pauses/Resumes the game (during COMBAT or BASE_BUILDING state). In PAUSED state, can also navigate the pause menu."
    ],
    "special_key_combinations": "None for this simplified version. All actions are direct key presses or mouse clicks."
  },
  "game_states": {
    "states": [
      "MENU: Displays game title, 'START GAME' button, 'OPTIONS' (non-functional placeholder).",
      "BASE_BUILDING: Player can view and upgrade base structures, collect resources, and manage heroes. Contains a 'Start Combat' button to proceed.",
      "COMBAT: Active lane-based combat against zombie waves. Heroes are deployed, battle ensues. Includes UI for hero cards, resources, score, level, wave count, and pause button.",
      "PAUSED: An overlay menu appears during COMBAT or BASE_BUILDING, allowing player to 'Resume', 'Restart Level', or 'Return to Main Menu'.",
      "LEVEL_TRANSITION: A brief screen displayed after completing a combat level, announcing 'Level [X] Complete!'. Automatically transitions to BASE_BUILDING after a few seconds.",
      "GAME_OVER: Displayed when player base HP reaches 0. Shows final score and a 'RETRY' button.",
      "WIN: Displayed upon successful completion of the final combat level. Shows final score and a 'PLAY AGAIN' button."
    ],
    "transitions": {
      "MENU -> BASE_BUILDING": "Click 'START GAME' button.",
      "BASE_BUILDING -> COMBAT": "Click 'Start Combat' or 'Next Level' button.",
      "COMBAT -> PAUSED": "Click 'Pause' button or press `Shift`.",
      "PAUSED -> COMBAT/BASE_BUILDING": "Click 'Resume' button.",
      "COMBAT -> LEVEL_TRANSITION": "All waves of the current level are defeated AND player base HP > 0.",
      "LEVEL_TRANSITION -> BASE_BUILDING": "Automatic transition after a short delay.",
      "COMBAT -> GAME_OVER": "Player base HP reaches 0.",
      "GAME_OVER -> MENU": "Click 'RETRY' button (restarts game from Level 1).",
      "COMBAT -> WIN": "All waves of the final level are defeated AND player base HP > 0.",
      "WIN -> MENU": "Click 'PLAY AGAIN' button (restarts game from Level 1)."
    }
  },
  "win_conditions": "The player successfully completes all 5 predefined combat levels, meaning they defeat all waves of Level 5 while maintaining their base's integrity (base HP > 0).",
  "lose_conditions": "The player's base HP reaches 0 during any combat level. This occurs if a cumulative total of 5 zombies successfully reach the far left edge of any lane.",
  "scoring_system": {
    "point_actions": [
      "+10 points per Basic Walker zombie killed.",
      "+20 points per Fast Runner zombie killed.",
      "+30 points per Tank Zombie killed.",
      "+50 points per obstacle (barricade, car) destroyed.",
      "+100 points per combat wave completed.",
      "+500 points per combat level completed.",
      "+5 points per unit of Gold or Supplies collected from base structures."
    ],
    "bonus_points": [
      "+200 points bonus if the player's base HP is above 80% at the end of a combat wave.",
      "+500 points bonus for clearing a level without any zombie reaching the base."
    ],
    "high_score_system": "Yes, the highest score achieved across all play sessions will be tracked and stored using `localStorage`.",
    "score_display": "The current score is continuously displayed in the top-right corner of the screen during `COMBAT` and `BASE_BUILDING` states, formatted as 'SCORE: XXXXX'. Font size should be easily readable, e.g., 20px, white color.",
    "score_affect_gameplay": "The score primarily serves as a metric for player progression and achievement. Higher scores do not directly grant in-game power-ups or resources during a single run, but a high score could unlock cosmetic achievements or serve as a competitive element for future multiplayer extensions (not implemented in this spec)."
  },
  "level_system": {
    "levels": [
      {
        "level_number": 1,
        "name": "First Contact",
        "difficulty_progression": "Introductory. Introduces core combat mechanics.",
        "enemies": "3 waves of only Basic Walkers (low HP, low damage, slow speed). Smallest number of zombies per wave.",
        "obstacles": "None.",
        "player_resources": "Small initial Gold/Supplies. Small rewards per wave.",
        "unlocks": "Starts with Infantry and Medic heroes. Simple Resource Generator structure."
      },
      {
        "level_number": 2,
        "name": "Scavenger's Run",
        "difficulty_progression": "Slight increase. Introduces a new zombie type and basic obstacles.",
        "enemies": "4 waves. Introduces Fast Runners (low HP, higher speed) alongside Basic Walkers. Increased zombie count per wave.",
        "obstacles": "Occasional simple barricades (1-2 hits to destroy) in random lanes.",
        "player_resources": "Medium Gold/Supplies rewards per wave/level.",
        "unlocks": "Engineer hero. Training Facility structure."
      },
      {
        "level_number": 3,
        "name": "Fortress Defense",
        "difficulty_progression": "Moderate increase. Introduces high HP, high damage zombie and more durable obstacles.",
        "enemies": "5 waves. Introduces Tank Zombies (high HP, high damage, very slow) alongside Basic Walkers and Fast Runners. Higher density of zombies per wave.",
        "obstacles": "More frequent barricades, occasional abandoned cars (3-4 hits to destroy).",
        "player_resources": "Higher Gold/Supplies rewards per wave/level. Unlocks higher upgrade tiers for base structures.",
        "unlocks": "N/A (focus on upgrading existing heroes/structures)."
      },
      {
        "level_number": 4,
        "name": "Outbreak Swarm",
        "difficulty_progression": "Significant increase. Larger, denser waves with more varied threats.",
        "enemies": "6 waves. Increased numbers and frequency of all zombie types, especially Fast Runners and Tank Zombies. Waves are longer in duration.",
        "obstacles": "More varied and durable obstacles, strategically placed to hinder hero advancement.",
        "player_resources": "Very High Gold/Supplies rewards.",
        "unlocks": "N/A (focus on maximizing hero levels and base defense)."
      },
      {
        "level_number": 5,
        "name": "Last Stand",
        "difficulty_progression": "Peak difficulty. Maximum zombie density and a final boss.",
        "enemies": "7 waves. Max density of all zombie types. Multiple Tank Zombies per wave. Final wave includes a 'Boss Zombie' (extremely high HP, unique ability like a short stun or area-of-effect attack).",
        "obstacles": "Heavily obstructed lanes, requiring strategic hero deployment and skill use.",
        "player_resources": "Maximum Gold/Supplies rewards upon completion.",
        "unlocks": "Game completion (Win state)."
      }
    ],
    "level_advancement": "After completing all waves of a combat level and securing the base (base HP > 0), the game transitions to the 'LEVEL_TRANSITION' screen, then automatically moves to the 'BASE_BUILDING' state. From the base, the player can choose to start the next combat level (if unlocked) via a UI button.",
    "level_transition_display": "Upon completing a level, a full-screen overlay briefly displays 'Level [X] Complete!' with a celebratory sound effect.",
    "level_indicator_on_screen": "Yes, 'LEVEL: X' is displayed in the top-left corner during `COMBAT` and `BASE_BUILDING` states, below the resource display."
  },
  "simplifications": {
    "multiplayer_features": "Completely removed. All 'alliances with others globally' and 'conflicts with other survivors' are abstracted or removed, making this a purely single-player experience against AI zombies.",
    "resource_collection_method": "Simplified 'Shake to gather resources' to a 'Click to collect all resources' button in the base building screen.",
    "base_building_complexity": "Limited to 3 main structures with instant upgrades. No complex build queues, resource dependencies beyond Gold/Supplies, or time-based building completion. Training units is simplified to unlocking and leveling up heroes through a 'Training Facility' structure.",
    "hero_collection_system": "No gacha or random hero draws. Heroes are unlocked sequentially by completing levels or upgrading the 'Training Facility'.",
    "hero_skills": "Each hero has a single, distinct active skill. No passive skills or complex skill trees.",
    "combat_mechanics": "Hero and zombie movement is simple kinematic movement along lanes. Collision detection for attacks is simplified (e.g., AABB collision for `rect()` or distance for `circle()`). No complex pathfinding or unit formations.",
    "matter_js_usage": "While Matter.js *could* be used for detailed physics, for initial implementation, p5.js drawing and custom collision logic (e.g., `dist()` checks, `rect()` overlaps) will be prioritized for most entities (heroes, zombies). Matter.js could be selectively integrated for more realistic obstacle destruction or projectile physics if time permits, but is not a core requirement for basic functionality."
  },
  "implementation_notes": "All visual elements should be drawn using p5.js drawing functions (`rect`, `circle`, `image`, `text`). Game state management will involve a `gameState` variable and associated functions for drawing and updating logic for each state. Score and level display are mandatory and must be visible at their specified locations during relevant game states. Level progression will be managed by checking the current level completion status and unlocking the next level's combat scenario, ensuring resources accumulated in the base building phase are carried over. High scores should be loaded on game start and saved on game over/win using `localStorage`."
}
game_info.description: Defend your base against waves of zombies in this lane-based tower defense game. Deploy heroes across three combat lanes to stop the undead hordes from reaching your base. Between battles, upgrade your base structures to unlock new heroes and improve your defenses. Complete all 5 levels while keeping your base intact to win. Each zombie that reaches your base deals damage—lose all your base HP and it's game over!
game_info.controls:
ENTER: Start the game
ESC: Pause/Unpause
R: Restart (return to start screen)
Arrow Keys (Up/Down): Select combat lane for deployment
W/A/S: Quick-select hero cards (Infantry/Engineer/Medic)
Space: Deploy selected hero to targeted lane (or collect resources in base)
Shift: Pause game
